title: elephantopsis biflora
intro: Elephantopsis biflora, also known as the "umbrella plant," is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elephantopsis biflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Elephantopsis biflora is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves are used in tinctures or as a poultice for external applications.
